title: Double Sided Sticky Tape Nano Tape 1M/3 FT Gel Adhesive Grip for Rugs Carpets Posters Photos 1mm x 3cm

1M Long x 3cm Wide by 1mm Thick (3.28FT x 1.18" x 0.04") Strong Tape
Strong Nano Technology. This Double Sided Sticky Tape Can Support Weights up to 1kg
Use to Hold Decorations on Walls, Use as a Rug Grip on Carpet, Endless Uses
Reusable Tape. Simply Peel Off, Wash and Thouroughly Dry Before Reusing.
Transluscent, Strong Tape Which Can Adhere to Almost Any Smooth, Clean Surface
You Must Ensure That Surfaces are Clean, Not Powdery or Wet. Please Note That This Tape is Strong and Can Remove Decorative Coverings When Removing
description: This double sided sticky tape is a versatile home improvement and home decor accessory that is perfect for anyone who needs a strong, double-sided tape for a variety of purposes. This heavy-duty, double-sided sticky tape can be used to hold rugs, pictures, hooks, and general items around the house. Please note that this double sided tape heavy duty needs to be fixed to a solid surface. If you attach it directly onto wall coverings, then the tape will only be as strong as the wall covering, so please bear this in mind. However, this rug grip tape is reusable - simply carefully peel it off, wash and dry it, and it can be used again. The Tape is available in many lengths, widths, and thicknesses, making it the perfect choice for any DIY project or no nails picture hanging strips. This mounting tape can also be used as number plate tape or for sticky tape for hanging pictures. Additionally, it is a great alternative for picture hanging strips. Whether you need double sided tape for walls, thin double sided tape, or sticky pads heavy duty, the Nano Tape is the perfect solution. So, add this heavy duty double sided tape to your collection of wall hanging strips, double-sided sticky pads, and picture frame tape today and take your home improvement and home decor projects to the next level!
